task_completion.description: Open the draft document in LibreOffice Writer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreOffice Writer application is open, displaying the initial text that includes 'OPEN HOUSE - SUNDAY', an address, a description, and features.

task_completion.description: Format the title 'OPEN HOUSE - SUNDAY' to be centered, bold, and at least 24pt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'OPEN HOUSE - SUNDAY' is centered on the page, bolded, and visibly much larger (at least 24pt) than the rest of the document text.

task_completion.description: Insert the luxury home image below the address.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image (a synthetic gradient background with text) is visible in the document, placed directly below the property address.

task_completion.description: Resize the image to fill the page width.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The inserted image spans horizontally across the entire page width, aligning closely with the left and right document margins (approximately 6-7 inches wide).

task_completion.description: Organize the Description and Features text into a two-column section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The lower portion of the document containing the 'Description' and 'Features' text is split vertically into two distinct columns.

task_completion.description: Format the features as a bulleted list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The items under the 'Features' section have standard bullet points preceding them.

task_completion.description: Save the final document as open_house_flyer.odt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreOffice Writer title bar displays 'open_house_flyer.odt', or a 'Save As' dialog is visible showing this exact filename being saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice Writer GUI to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the LibreOffice Writer interface being actively used (menus, toolbars, dialogs), rather than terminal commands or scripts generating the document in the background.

integrity.description: The agent used the provided synthetic image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The image inserted into the document must be the synthetic gradient image with text generated by the setup script, not a real photograph of a luxury home downloaded from the internet.

integrity.description: The agent used native word processor formatting for columns and bullets.
integrity.visual_evidence: The two-column layout and bulleted lists should appear as native LibreOffice formatting (e.g., proper alignment, standard bullet glyphs), not simulated using manual spaces, tabs, or typed asterisks.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input document is '/home/ga/Documents/property_draft.docx'. The title text to format is 'OPEN HOUSE - SUNDAY', which must be >=24pt, bold, and centered. The image to insert is '/home/ga/Documents/images/luxury_home.jpg', which is a synthetic 1024x768 gradient image with text (not a real photo). The image must be resized to fill the page width (~6-7 inches). The Description and Features must be in a 2-column section. The final file must be saved as 'open_house_flyer.odt'.
